prompt: A 90s disposable-camera style flash snapshot taken inside a small, bustling Japanese izakaya decorated with handwritten menus and retro posters. Direct flash creates grain, harsh shadows, and bright highlights. A young woman sits on a wooden bar stool, turning her upper body back toward the camera. She wears a soft red cardigan over a white tank top, paired with a short black skirt. The red cardigan pops beautifully under the flash, complementing her blushed cheeks and glossy lips. Behind her, older patrons sit in the dim, noisy environment, contrasting with her vivid, intimate glow. The image feels nostalgic, imperfect, and emotionally intimate.
